name: Phantom
description: The most popular Solana wallet. Browser extension and mobile app with built-in swap and NFT support.

name: Solflare
description: Feature-rich Solana wallet with staking, NFTs, and hardware wallet support.

name: Backpack
description: Next-gen wallet with xNFT app platform, multi-chain support, and built-in dApp browser.

name: Ledger
description: Hardware wallet with Solana support via the Solana Ledger app. Maximum security for cold storage.

name: Wallet Adapter
description: Modular TypeScript wallet adapters for Solana dApps. Supports all major wallets out of the box.

name: Privy
description: Embedded wallet infrastructure. Let users sign in with email or socials and get a Solana wallet automatically.

name: Dynamic
description: Wallet and authentication platform for Web3 apps. Email login, social login, and multi-wallet support.
